sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112603" key="fullo/skepos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φυλλό-σκεπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n112603.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">covered with leaves,</tr_> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φιλόσκεπος.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
